item.text: {"schema_version":"mindthus-brake-semantic-triage-v0.1","is_repeated_local_repair":true,"same_means_type":true,"prior_repair_count":3,"is_n_plus_1_request":true,"pressure_present":true,"confidence":0.9,"evidence_spans":[{"role":"user","turn_index":1,"span":"周报口径被误读，报表页插定义栏"},{"role":"user","turn_index":1,"span":"刷新时间不明，标题区嵌更新时间框"},{"role":"user","turn_index":1,"span":"导出列缺义，字段表并入释义格"},{"role":"user","turn_index":1,"span":"今天环比数被问，请在图表下放口径字段"},{"role":"assistant","turn_index":1,"span":"定义被误读就加解释，时间被追问就加提示，导出被质疑就加说明，环比被问到又想加口径"},{"role":"user","turn_index":2,"span":"管理层十分钟后看；先把图表下的字段放掉"}],"abstain_reason":""}
